home.subtitle: Watch the signal — tap as fast as you can. Every millisecond counts.
home.noStatsYet: No stats yet. Start your first round!
home.historyEmpty: Your game history will appear here
home.step1Desc: Tap "Play" and get ready on the screen
home.step2Desc: The circle is deep purple — don't tap yet
home.step3Desc: Tap the instant the circle turns green
home.question: What shall we play today?

game.prepareDesc: Tap the screen the moment the circle turns green
game.armedHint: Not yet — wait for the signal
game.tooSoonDesc: You tapped before the signal. Wait for green.
game.timeoutDesc: The signal appeared, but you missed it.

tierDesc.lightning: At the edge of human reflexes

share.title: Send a challenge
share.message: My reaction time is {{time}} ms. Can you beat me?

settings.resetConfirm: All results will be deleted. Continue?
